text: 1301 - وَقَالَ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: إِنَّ أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ يُتِمُّونَ اَلصَّلاَةَ بِعَرَفَاتٍ ، قَالَ «وَيْلَهُمْ أَوْ وَيْحَهُمْ وَ أَيُّ سَفَرٍ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُ لاَ لاَ يُتَمُّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1301 - Muawiya ibn Ammar said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as): "The people of Mecca complete (perform in full) their prayers at Arafat."
He (as) replied: "Woe to them! (Or, Alas for them!) What journey is more significant than this? No, it should not be completed”.
